steps.expected: Shop page with product grid displayed
steps.observed: Shop page rendered with 6 products in a 3-column grid, category filters (All, Seasonings, Juices, Bundles), and sort dropdown

steps.action: Click on Green Vitality Juice product card
steps.observed: PDP rendered with product image, name, rating (89 reviews), Subscribe & Save ($10.20) / One-Time Purchase ($12.00) toggle, quantity selector, and ADD TO CART button

steps.expected: Cart slide-in panel opens with the item
steps.observed: Cart slide-in opened showing 'YOUR CART (1)' with Green Vitality Juice, $12.00, quantity 1, Subtotal $12.00, VIEW CART and CHECKOUT buttons

steps.action: Click View Cart link in slide-in
steps.expected: Cart page shows item with correct details
steps.observed: Cart page displayed with Green Vitality Juice (image, name, description 'Cold-pressed daily greens'), Quantity 1, Unit Price $12.00, Total $12.00, Order Summary with Subtotal $12.00, Estimated Delivery $11.95, Order Total $23.95

evidence.consoleErrors: Hydration mismatch on cart badge (server renders 0 items, client has 1 item) - expected behavior since cart state is client-side only

steps.action: Starting state: cart page with Green Vitality Juice (qty 1, $12.00)
steps.observed: Green Vitality Juice present in cart with correct details

steps.expected: About page displayed, cart badge still shows 1
steps.observed: About page ('Meet Chef Kyla') loaded correctly. Cart badge in header still shows 1 item.

steps.expected: Cart page shows same item with same details
steps.observed: Cart page shows Green Vitality Juice, Quantity 1, Unit Price $12.00, Total $12.00, Order Total $23.95 - all identical to before navigation

evidence.consoleErrors: Hydration mismatch on cart badge (expected - server always renders 0, client has 1 from React Context)

summary: Tested 2 assertions: 2 passed. VAL-CROSS-002 (product browsing to cart flow) confirmed the full path from shop grid → PDP → add to cart → cart slide-in → cart page works correctly. VAL-CROSS-006 (cart persistence across navigation) confirmed cart contents survive navigation to /about and back to /cart. Hydration mismatch warnings observed on cart badge count (server=0, client=1) are expected behavior for client-side React Context cart state.
